posts.text:
"They keep telling us that we have to be informed consumers with healthcare. This is not trying to pick between Cocoa Puffs and Cap'n Crunch. We can't understand this stuff. It's too complicated. We need one fix, not this little crap." 

Watch #TheEndOfMyLifeIsKillingMe author @annabellegurwitch1 get real about #TrumpRx and more on the latest episode of #RTOvertime with @BillMaher, now streaming on @hbomax and the #RealTimeHBO YouTube channel.

Trump announced the new head of Homeland Security will be Markwayne Mullin. He said, "Get me someone whose name sounds like a serial killer!”

Watch @annabellegurwitch1, @donlemonofficial and @senadamschiff join @billmaher on the latest episode of #RTOvertime, now streaming on our YouTube channel.
